name: Ribbon Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Bake pie shell according to directions for an empty baked crust. Cool.
3. Chop one cup of strawberries.
4. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch. Gradually stir in water until smooth.
5. Add chopped strawberries and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
6. Remove from heat and stir in food coloring. Cool in refrigerator for half an hour.
7. Pour three-quarters of the syrup into the prepared pie crust.
8. Stand up the remaining strawberries in the pie crust, reserving one-fourth cup (about 3 large strawberries) for garnish.
9. Pour the remaining syrup over the strawberries.
10. Chill until firm, about 3 hours.
11. To serve, top each slice with whipped topping and a slice of reserved strawberry.
